description: Use this API to construct a Distribution Factor Data File (activity DFAX). This API routine was first introduced in release 33.6.0. ierr = dfax_2(options, subfile, monfile, confile, dfxfile)
python_syntax: ierr = dfax_2(options, subfile, monfile, confile, dfxfile)

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of 3 elements specifying calculation options. The value of each element is as follows. (input).

parameters.name: subfile
parameters.description: Is the name of the subsystem description file. (input).

parameters.name: monfile
parameters.description: Is the name of monitored element description file. (input).

parameters.name: confile
parameters.description: Is the name of contingency description data file. (input).

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Is the name of distribution factor data file. (input).

options.description: distribution factor option flag. (1 by default).
do not calculate distribution factors (i.e., DFAX,AC).
monitored element sorting flag (0 by default).
do not sort (i.e., leave in Monitored Element Description File order).
out-of-service monitored branch flag (0 by default).
eliminate out-of-service branch from monitored branches.
keep out-of-service branch in monitored branches.

error_codes.description: buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
no Distribution Factor Data File specified.
no Monitored Element Data input file specified.
no Contingency Description Data file specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
